comments: Approved. The contract scope is properly bounded to dispatching an external Opencode CLI agent to analyze and refactor only src/mcp-server/src/index.ts, src/mcp-server/src/worktree-manager.ts, and bin/agent-protocol-uninstall.js, while explicitly forbidding business-logic or state-machine semantic changes. Scope item 3 correctly limits Hermes to monitoring Opencode execution and output, which preserves L2/L3 separation of duties. The out_of_scope clause also correctly forbids Hermes from directly altering source code via shell redirects, patch, or python, which is stricter than and consistent with the required prohibition on hand-written shell/python patches. allowed_files, allowed_artifacts, and stop_conditions are aligned with the bounded refactor-only intent. The build-pass requirement does not expand scope beyond the permitted refactor verification envelope because it serves as validation rather than authorization for semantic change.
